goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'thursday'.
The train should go to 'norwich' and should 'arrive by 18:30'.
Make sure you get 'price'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'attraction type' and 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on thursday
The train should go to norwich and should arrive by 18:30
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre
Make sure you get attraction type and phone number
